grounding_checkpoint_required: Colin must populate .claude/settings.local.json with actual values: CRON_SECRET and SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY (NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL is pre-filled as https://xpanlbcjueimeofgsara.supabase.co). File is gitignored — must be created locally.

After populating settings.local.json, run any coordinator session to completion. Then query: SELECT id, status, sent_at, created_at, (extract(epoch from sent_at) - extract(epoch from created_at))::int as latency_s FROM outbound_notifications ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 3; Expect: newest row status=sent, latency_s < 60.
If latency_s is NULL or > 300, check agent_events for notification_env_missing rows — env vars may not be injecting into coordinator bash as expected.
unknowns: allowedHosts key name not confirmed from Anthropic Claude Code docs — used the name specified in acceptance doc.
